description_long: This hamburger features a golden-brown sesame seed bun with a smooth, slightly domed top. The top bun is generously sprinkled with white sesame seeds, giving it a classic appearance. Beneath the bun, a slice of pale yellow cheese is visible, partially melted over a thick, textured beef patty. The patty appears juicy and well-cooked, with a realistic grilled texture. Thin slices of white onion are layered between the cheese and the top bun, adding a crisp accent. The bottom bun is slightly flatter and supports the entire stack, completing the traditional hamburger look.
description: A classic hamburger with a sesame seed bun, beef patty, cheese slice, and visible onion rings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sesame seed bun, cheese slice, beef patty, and onion rings clearly layered.
description_view_1: Side view with the cheese slice and patty more prominent, and the onion rings peeking out from under the bun.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the even distribution of cheese and onions, with the patty's texture visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cheese slice extending out and the patty's edge, with the bun's sesame seeds visible.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Cheese is layered directly on top of the beef patty, with onion rings placed above the cheese and beneath the top bun. The toppings are evenly distributed and visible from all sides.
